prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic vertical portrait of Sub-Zero, Kuai Liang, an East Asian male ice ninja warrior in a frozen storm. He has slicked-back black hair dusted with snow, intense narrowed eyes, strong eyebrows, and a dark blue ornate armored face mask covering his nose and mouth. He wears layered deep navy and black leather-and-metal martial armor with frosted engraved shoulder guards, bracers, fingerless gloves, a wrapped torso sash, and an ornate blue waist plate, all textured with ice crystals and battle wear. Frame him from mid-thigh to head in a dynamic three-quarter pose, body angled left while staring directly at the viewer. His near hand is raised in front of his chest, palm outward, conjuring a glowing cluster of blue-white ice energy and frost mist; the other arm hangs back ready for combat. The environment is a cold icy battlefield with blurred glaciers and swirling snow, pale blue-gray background, falling snowflakes in foreground and background, visible frost particles, and dramatic cold rim lighting. Use deep navy blue, black, icy cyan, steel gray, and white, high-contrast cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed costume textures, realistic skin, wet frozen highlights, and a serious lethal mood. Vertical 9:16 composition, photoreal blockbuster fantasy style, no text, no logo, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic vertical portrait of Sub-Zero, Kuai Liang, an East Asian male ice ninja warrior in a frozen storm. He has slicked-back black hair dusted with snow, intense narrowed eyes, strong eyebrows, and a dark blue ornate armored face mask covering his nose and mouth. He wears layered deep navy and black leather-and-metal martial armor with frosted engraved shoulder guards, bracers, fingerless gloves, a wrapped torso sash, and an ornate blue waist plate, all textured with ice crystals and battle wear. Frame him from mid-thigh to head in a dynamic three-quarter pose, body angled left while staring directly at the viewer. His near hand is raised in front of his chest, palm outward, conjuring a glowing cluster of blue-white ice energy and frost mist; the other arm hangs back ready for combat. The environment is a cold icy battlefield with blurred glaciers and swirling snow, pale blue-gray background, falling snowflakes in foreground and background, visible frost particles, and dramatic cold rim lighting. Use deep navy blue, black, icy cyan, steel gray, and white, high-contrast cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed costume textures, realistic skin, wet frozen highlights, and a serious lethal mood. Vertical 9:16 composition, photoreal blockbuster fantasy style, no text, no logo, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的电影级竖版肖像，主角为 Sub-Zero, Kuai Liang，一位身处冰雪风暴中的东亚男性冰霜忍者战士。他留着向后梳的黑色短发，发丝上覆盖着薄雪，眼神锐利深邃，眉毛浓密，佩戴着深蓝色华丽的金属面罩，遮住口鼻。他身穿深海军蓝与黑色交织的皮革金属武术盔甲，肩甲、护腕、露指手套、缠绕的腰带和华丽的蓝色腰甲上布满了冰晶和战斗痕迹。画面采用从大腿中部到头部的构图，呈现动态的三分之四侧身姿势，身体向左倾斜，直视镜头。他靠近镜头的一只手抬至胸前，掌心向外，正召唤出一团发光的蓝白色冰霜能量和寒雾；另一只手臂向后垂下，随时准备战斗。环境为寒冷的冰雪战场，背景是模糊的冰川和纷飞的雪花，色调为淡蓝灰色，前景和背景中可见飘落的雪花、明显的冰霜颗粒以及戏剧性的冷色调轮廓光。使用 深海军蓝、黑色、冰青色、钢灰色和白色，高对比度电影级布光，浅景深，超精细的服装纹理，逼真的皮肤质感，湿润的冰冻高光，营造出严肃且致命的氛围。9:16 竖版构图，照片级大片奇幻风格，无文字，无 Logo，无水印。
